[{"id":"otphdr1","type":"header","data":{"text":"Verification Inbox","col":12}},{"id":"otppara1","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"

To use this service, have people send to:

  • SMS \u2192 +1 618 272 1234
  • Email \u2192 account@verify.pestalozzi.international (send directly, or forward/CC)

Anything sent there shows up below live, with the OTP code or verification link pulled out automatically. Add or manage numbers and addresses any time in Monitored Endpoint.
